regression_risks: Dashboard delta still has a direct external path outside report packet fan-out: both onboarding close-recording hooks call send_dashboard_building_delta(child_id, project_ref=project_ref, allow_real_delivery=True). If project_ref_for_building_root(handle.output_root) returns None for a temp/legacy root, the call remains legacy un-narrowed rather than halted.

send_dashboard_building_delta itself gates only on allow_real_delivery and dashboard env, then projects by ledger lookup. It has no building-root or external_delivery_allowed guard, so the dashboard half of the F12 rule is not closed at the sink boundary.
Current temp-root auto-wire checker proves reporter-side sink filtering, but not the sink-level guard if Slack/dashboard refs still reach deliver_report_packet.
remaining_delta: Guard the direct dashboard delta path or route it through the same real-vessel packet/seam guard.
